title: copy into ignore null as directive if first column doesn't come from file
poc: create table t (id int auto_increment, a clob, b clob);
key_bug_features: copy into ignores null directive for first column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (id int auto_increment, a clob, b clob, c int DEFAULT 0);
COPY INTO t (a, b) FROM (SELECT 'text4', NULL);
SELECT * FROM t WHERE c IS NULL OR a IS NULL;
